title: trachelospermum axillare
intro: Trachelospermum axillare, a type of flowering evergreen vine native to China, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trachelospermum axillare include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions due to its antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its leaves or roots in hot water to create a tea, which is used to treat various health issues.
